case_title: ELLEZA FLORES VS. MACY'S WEST STORES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, ELLEZA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, ELLEZA AS TO DEFENDANT MACY'S WEST STORES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-15-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY REAGAN FLORES AS TAGALOG INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JENNIFER KEIM, OPERATIONS MANAGER. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ELLEZA FLORES IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY REAGAN FLORES WITH TAGALOG INTERPRETATION. MR. FLORES WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH. DEFENDANT MACY'S WEST STORES, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JENNIFER KEIM, OPERATIONS MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FLORES, ELLEZA AS TO DEFENDANT MACY'S WEST STORES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-14-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MACY'S WEST STORES, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLORES, ELLEZA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACY'S WEST STORES, INC. $1,650.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
